Title: Create new page in Page Builder
Preconditions: Admin logged in; CMS module installed
Steps:
1. Navigate to Content > Pages
2. Click Add button
3. Enter page name and permalink
4. Select language
5. Click Save
Expected Result: New page created with Draft status; appears in page list

Title: Edit created page
Steps:
1. Open existing page from list
2. Edit Name and Permalink fields
3. Click Save
Expected Result: Page updated successfully with new values

Title: Preview page
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Click Preview
Expected Result: Page preview displayed correctly

Title: Open page in designer (Builder)
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Click Open Designer button
Expected Result: Builder/Designer opens for page editing

Title: Archive page
Preconditions: Page exists in Draft or Published status
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Click Archive button
3. Confirm
Expected Result: Page status changes to Archived

Title: Publish draft page
Steps:
1. Open draft page
2. Click Publish button
Expected Result: Page status transitions from Draft to Published

Title: Publish to Archive transition
Steps:
1. Open published page
2. Click Archive
Expected Result: Page status transitions from Published to Archived

Title: Draft to Archive transition
Steps:
1. Open draft page
2. Click Archive
Expected Result: Page status transitions from Draft to Archived

Title: Verify Draft status badge in grid
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pages list
2. Locate draft page in grid
Expected Result: Draft badge displayed with correct color styling

Title: Verify Published status badge in grid
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pages list
2. Locate published page
Expected Result: Published badge displayed with correct color styling

Title: Verify Archived status badge in grid
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pages list
2. Locate archived page
Expected Result: Archived badge displayed with correct color styling

Title: Verify Scheduled badge in grid
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pages list
2. Locate scheduled page
Expected Result: Scheduled badge displayed alongside status badge

Title: Verify Personalized badge in grid
Preconditions: Page with visibility/user group restrictions exists
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pages list
2. Locate personalized page
Expected Result: Personalized badge displayed alongside status badge

Title: Grid columns display correctly
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pages list
2. Verify all columns visible
Expected Result: Grid displays name, status, badges, dates correctly

Title: Checkbox selection and bulk selection
Steps:
1. Select individual page checkboxes
2. Use bulk select checkbox
Expected Result: Individual and bulk selection works; totals counter updates

Title: Search functionality in page list
Steps:
1. Enter search term in search field
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Page list filtered by search term

Title: Status filter - Draft pages only
Steps:
1. Click Draft filter in navigation
2. Verify counter and list
Expected Result: Only draft pages shown; counter matches list count

Title: Status filter - Active (Published) pages only
Steps:
1. Click Active filter in navigation
2. Verify counter and list
Expected Result: Only published/active pages shown; counter matches

Title: Status filter - Pending (Scheduled) pages only
Steps: 1. Click Pending filter in navigation
Expected Result: Only scheduled pages shown; counter matches

Title: Status filter - Archived pages only
Steps: 1. Click Archived filter in navigation
Expected Result: Only archived pages shown; counter matches

Title: Counters update when page status changes
Steps:
1. Note current counter values
2. Publish a draft page
3. Check counters
Expected Result: Draft counter decrements; Active counter increments

Title: Page blade - Basic information fields
Steps:
1. Open a page
2. Verify Basic information section
Expected Result: Name, Permalink (with read-only domain), Language dropdown visible

Title: Scheduling section - set start and end dates
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Expand Scheduling section
3. Set Start date via datepicker
4. Set End date via datepicker
5. Save
Expected Result: Scheduling dates saved; Scheduled badge appears

Title: Personalization - visibility toggle
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Expand Personalization section
3. Toggle Visibility OFF
4. Save
Expected Result: Visibility setting saved; page restricted to registered users only

Title: Personalization - User groups restriction
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Expand Personalization section
3. Select User groups from dropdown
4. Save
Expected Result: User group restriction saved; Personalized badge appears

Title: Personalization - Organization restriction
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Expand Personalization section
3. Select Organization from dropdown
4. Save
Expected Result: Organization restriction saved; page accessible only to authorized org users

Title: Published page accessible on frontend (correct language)
Steps:
1. Navigate to frontend URL with correct language prefix
2. Access page by permalink
Expected Result: Page content displayed correctly on frontend

Title: Published page 404 on frontend - wrong language
Steps:
1. Navigate to frontend with different language prefix
2. Access page by permalink
Expected Result: 404 page returned for wrong language

Title: Draft page NOT accessible on frontend
Steps:
1. Navigate to frontend
2. Attempt to access draft page URL
Expected Result: Page not accessible; 404 or redirect returned

Title: Archived page NOT accessible on frontend
Steps:
1. Navigate to frontend
2. Attempt to access archived page URL
Expected Result: Page not accessible; 404 or redirect returned

Title: Published page appears in search
Steps:
1. Navigate to frontend
2. Search for page title
Expected Result: Published page appears in search results under PAGES section

Title: Draft page NOT in search results
Steps: 1. Search for draft page title on frontend
Expected Result: Draft page does not appear in search results

Title: Scheduled page with future start date - not accessible
Preconditions: Page scheduled with future start date
Steps:
1. Navigate to frontend
2. Attempt to access scheduled page URL
Expected Result: Page not accessible before start date

Title: Scheduled page within valid date range - accessible
Preconditions: Page scheduled with current date in range
Steps:
1. Navigate to frontend
2. Access scheduled page URL
Expected Result: Page accessible within valid date range

Title: Search returns only current language pages
Steps: 1. Search on frontend in specific language context
Expected Result: Only pages matching current language returned

Title: Add section to page
Steps:
1. Open page designer
2. Click Add Section
3. Select section type
4. Configure content
5. Save
Expected Result: Section added to page successfully

Title: Copy section in page
Preconditions: Page has at least one section
Steps:
1. Open page designer
2. Click Copy on existing section
Expected Result: Section duplicated in page

Title: Remove section from page
Preconditions: Page has at least one section
Steps:
1. Open page designer
2. Click Remove on section
3. Confirm
Expected Result: Section removed from page

Title: Simple text block - add and preview
Steps:
1. Add Simple Text section
2. Enter text content in General tab
3. Configure Settings tab
4. Preview
Expected Result: Simple text block rendered correctly with configured settings

Title: Simple image block - add and preview
Steps:
1. Add Simple Image section
2. Upload image in General tab
3. Configure Settings tab
4. Preview
Expected Result: Simple image block rendered correctly

Title: Text over image block - add and preview
Steps:
1. Add Text Over Image section
2. Configure text and image
3. Preview
Expected Result: Text over image block rendered correctly

Title: Cards list block - add and preview
Steps:
1. Add Cards List section
2. Add card items
3. Preview
Expected Result: Cards list block rendered with all items

Title: Two columns list block - add and preview
Steps:
1. Add Two Columns section
2. Configure both columns
3. Preview
Expected Result: Two columns layout rendered correctly

Title: Video and text block - add and preview
Steps:
1. Add Video and Text section
2. Configure video URL and text
3. Preview
Expected Result: Video and text block rendered correctly

Title: Page builder field types - text and rich text
Steps:
1. Use text field to enter content
2. Use rich text editor with formatting
3. Use image upload field
4. Use select/dropdown field
Expected Result: All field types function correctly in page builder

Title: Color preset - Blue theme
Steps:
1. Select Blue preset
2. Preview page
Expected Result: Blue color preset applied to page elements

Title: Color preset - Dark theme
Steps:
1. Select Dark preset
2. Preview page
Expected Result: Dark color preset applied to page elements

Title: Custom colors - background and text
Steps:
1. Navigate to Colors > General
2. Set custom Background color
3. Set custom Text color
4. Set custom Headings color
5. Preview
Expected Result: Custom colors applied to page elements

Title: Custom colors - links buttons and borders
Steps:
1. Set custom Links color
2. Set custom Button color
3. Set custom Button text color
4. Set custom Borders color
5. Preview
Expected Result: Custom link/button/border colors applied correctly

Title: Section settings - Image with text
Steps:
1. Open Image with text section
2. Configure all settings options
3. Preview
Expected Result: Image with text section renders with configured settings

Title: Multiple badge combinations
Steps:
1. Create pages with: Published+Scheduled, Published+Personalized, Published+Scheduled+Personalized
2. Check grid view
Expected Result: Multiple badges display correctly in combination

Title: Partial search match and case-insensitive search
Steps:
1. Search with partial page name
2. Search with different case
3. Search with special characters
Expected Result: Partial match returns results; search is case-insensitive

Title: Page Builder Admin shows correct frontend URL
Steps:
1. Open page in admin
2. Check frontend URL display
Expected Result: Frontend URL displayed correctly in admin matches actual page URL

Title: Cross-browser compatibility - Chrome and Edge
Steps:
1. Open CMS page management in Chrome
2. Verify all features work
3. Repeat in Edge
Expected Result: All CMS features functional in Chrome and Edge browsers

Title: Login and user profile in Page Builder admin
Steps:
1. Login to Page Builder admin with valid credentials
2. Verify user profile display
3. Check logo display
Expected Result: Login successful; user profile and logo displayed correctly
